title: Grocery Shopping
content: On Friday evening, Nora went grocery shopping after work. The supermarket was crowded with people buying food for the weekend. Nora pushed her cart slowly through the aisles. She bought milk, bread, apples, chicken, and pasta. She also added chocolate ice cream because it was on sale. At the checkout line, a little boy smiled at her while holding a large bag of chips. When Nora arrived home, she put everything away and started cooking dinner. She enjoyed quiet evenings at home after busy workdays.
